name: Spicy Rice and Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add celery and asafetida; cook until celery becomes translucent.
2. Stir in ginger, chili seeds, cumin seeds, and garam masala. Cook, stirring occasionally, until spices turn brown and aromatic.
3. Stir in rice and mix well to coat evenly. Cook for a few minutes until the rice begins to become slightly golden.
4. Pour in water and soy sauce. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer gently until all liquid is absorbed and cooked through (about 10-15 minutes).
6. Stir in raisins, cashews, peanuts, almonds, and sesame seeds. Simmer for an additional 15-20 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for a few minutes before serving. Garnish with toasted nuts and seeds if desired. Serves 6 to 8.
